import React from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { CheckCircle, Clock, XCircle, ExternalLink, Github, Linkedin, Briefcase, User } from 'lucide-react'; const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const profile = user?.profile || {}; const status = profile.status || 'pending'; const statusConfig = { pending: { color: 'text-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-50', icon: , label: 'Under Review' }, shortlisted: { color: 'text-emerald-500', bg: 'bg-emerald-50', icon: , label: 'Shortlisted' }, rejected: { color: 'text-rose-500', bg: 'bg-rose-50', icon: , label: 'Not Selected' } }; const currentStatus = statusConfig[status]; return (

Welcome, {user?.name}

Track your application and profile status.

{currentStatus.icon} {currentStatus.label}

Profile Overview

Role {profile.specialization || 'Not set'}
Experience {profile.experience_level || 'Not set'}
Skills
{profile.skills?.map((skill, i) => ( {skill} ))}

Active Interviews

No active interviews yet. We'll notify you soon!

Quick Links

GitHub
LinkedIn
View Resume
); }; export default Dashboard;
